ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRINGLEDRESSLER, MIRANDA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED TO PAY $500.00 PER MONTH TOWARD THE OUTSTANDING DEBT. THE COURT DENIES THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO THE SEIZED FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,036.94 AND ORDERS THAT THE LEVYING OFFICER RELEASE THOSE FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE COURT INDICATES IT WILL SIGN A FORMAL ORDER, COPIES OF WHICH WILL BE MAILED MAIL TO THE PARTIES AND TO THE LEVYING OFFICER. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR#8600, E-MAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ALAN J. SHERWOOD, ESQ. of Hurte Henriques (Tel: 510-409-6199) appearing for plaintiff/judgment creditor Midland Funding LLC;
Defendant/judgment debtor MIRANDA DRESSLER (Tel: 707-769-9975) appearing in pro per.

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Matter argued by the parties. The Court instructs the parties to confer in the hallway to attempt to work out an agreement. After conferring, the parties inform the Court that they have been unable to reach an agreement. Matter argued further and submitted. The Court rules as follows: The judgment debtor is ordered to pay $500.00 per month toward the outstanding debt. The Court denies the judgment debtor's claim of exemption as to the seized funds in the amount of $1,036.94 and orders that the levying officer release those funds to the judgment creditor.

The Court indicates it will sign a formal order, copies of which will be mailed mail to the parties and to the levying officer.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
